title: orthocarpus purpureoalbus
intro: Orthocarpus purpureoalbus, also known as Purple Alba Plantain, is a perennial plant that belongs to the plantain family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Orthocarpus purpureoalbus include its ability to aid in respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to soothe digestive problems and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Orthocarpus purpureoalbus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
